title: Mace Smash
description:
TO USE THIS MOD PRESS [B]

This mod add custom mace smash effect while keeping the vanilla particles. 
It is cool new and custom it adds 11 new smash attacks. Made by the maker of mace aim mod
body:
TO USE THIS MOD PRESS {B}
Custom Mace smash this mod keeps the feel of Minecraft. And keeps the current Mace particles but adds an extra punch and style to your mace attacks. If you fall nine blocksor more you activate the effect. There are 11 effects you toggle through defualt keybind B. Hope you enjoy. Mod will be getting updates for past versions. 1.21.10-1.21.8 Its perfct for adding a ore falre to mac pvp and it goes great with mace aim mod
